content: There is a setting in settings>general to make thunderbird the app, but I think you also need to go to 'default apps' in windows to establish the link from windows to thunderbird.
creator: davidsk

content: Open your browser settings and look for something that sets the application for mailto links.

content: Thanks for the quick response guys. Changing the setting in Default Apps has fixed it.
